name: Maya's Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes at least 2 hours ahead. Leave to cool.
2. Just before cooking the dish, cube the potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
3. Heat oil over a medium flame. Fry the potatoes in small batches until golden brown on all sides. Drain and set aside. Save some of the oil for later use.
4. Blend onion and garlic with 3 tablespoons water.
5. Heat 6 tablespoons oil in a large pot. When very hot, add asafetida, fenugreek, fennel, onion, mustard seeds, and bay leaf in quick succession. Fry for 20 seconds until the bay leaf darkens.
6. Add the paste from the blender and turmeric. Fry, stirring for 5 minutes.
7. Add tomatoes and sugar. Gently stir in 2 cups water, salt, and potatoes. Bring to a boil.
8. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes. Turn each potato over and simmer another 10 minutes.
9. Serve hot.
